cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to find all integer bases $ b > 9 $ where $ 17_b $ divides $ 97_b $. Then sum those bases and respond with the answer. Let me start by understanding what this notation means. First, numbers in base $ b $: $ 17_b $ means $ 1 \times b + 7 $, right? Similarly, $ 97_b $ is $ 9 \times b + 7 $. So I need to translate these base $ b $ numbers into base 10 and then figure out when one divides the other. So, converting them to base 10: $ 17_b = 1 \times b + 7 = b + 7 $. $ 97_b = 9 \times b + 7 = 9b + 7 $. So the problem is asking for bases $ b > 9 $ such that $ b + 7 $ divides $ 9b + 7 $.
